name: sort by splits year
description: Test case for sort by splits year
expected_query:
with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2024]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.primary_position IN ('RB')), "player_years_weeks" as (SELECT player_years.pid, nfl_year_week_timestamp.year, nfl_year_week_timestamp.week FROM player_years INNER JOIN nfl_year_week_timestamp ON player_years.year = nfl_year_week_timestamp.year WHERE nfl_year_week_timestamp.year = 2024), "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2024.nfl_team) as teams, "nfl_games"."season_year" as "year" from "player_gamelogs_year_2024" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2024) group by "nfl_games"."season_year", "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."pid"), "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."year", ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 <= 20 AND bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1.30 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 <= 20 AND trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 2.25 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 > 20 AND bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 0.48 WHEN nfl_plays.ydl_100 > 20 AND trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1.43 ELSE 0 END), 2) as weighted_opportunity_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) group by "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid, trg_pid)), "player_participation_weeks" as (SELECT pid, year, week, bool_or(active) AS active
          FROM (SELECT pgl.pid, 2024::int AS year, g.week, pgl.active
       FROM player_gamelogs_year_2024 pgl
       INNER JOIN nfl_games g ON g.esbid = pgl.esbid
       WHERE g.season_type = 'REG' AND g.season_year = 2024) src
          GROUP BY pid, year, week), "player_years_teams" as (SELECT pid, year, array_agg(DISTINCT team_code) AS teams
          FROM (SELECT pgl.pid, 2024::int AS year, pgl.nfl_team AS team_code
       FROM player_gamelogs_year_2024 pgl
       INNER JOIN nfl_games g ON g.esbid = pgl.esbid
       WHERE pgl.active = TRUE AND g.season_type = 'REG' AND g.season_year = 2024) src
          GROUP BY pid, year), "team_weeks_played" as (select distinct "team", "year", "week" from ((select "h" as "team", "season_year" as "year", "week" from "nfl_games" where "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2024)) union all (select "v" as "team", "season_year" as "year", "week" from "nfl_games" where "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2024))) as "g") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."primary_position" AS "primary_position_0", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.teams as player_nfl_teams_0, "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."weighted_opportunity_from_plays" AS "weighted_opportunity_from_plays_0", "player_years_weeks"."week", "player_years_weeks"."year", CASE
     WHEN player_participation_weeks.active THEN 'active'
     WHEN player_participation_weeks.pid IS NULL
          AND player_years_teams.teams IS NOT NULL
          AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM team_weeks_played
            WHERE team_weeks_played.year = player_years_weeks.year
              AND team_weeks_played.week = player_years_weeks.week
              AND team_weeks_played.team = ANY(player_years_teams.teams)
          )
       THEN 'bye'
     ELSE NULL
   END AS participation_status, "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "player_years_weeks" on "player_years_weeks"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_years_weeks"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb" on "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb"."year" = "player_years_weeks"."year" left join "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288" on "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."year" = 2024 and td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288.week = player_years_weeks.week left join "player_participation_weeks" on "player_participation_weeks"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_participation_weeks"."year" = "player_years_weeks"."year" and "player_participation_weeks"."week" = "player_years_weeks"."week" left join "player_years_teams" on "player_years_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_years_teams"."year" = "player_years_weeks"."year" where player.primary_position IN ('RB') and 'TB'::text = ANY(t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.teams::text[]) group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."primary_position", t05e39f5f70132b957d199bed4db535fb.teams, "td3e58c9af2784a38918c4ab350c00288"."weighted_opportunity_from_plays", "player_years_weeks"."week", "player_years_weeks"."year", CASE
     WHEN player_participation_weeks.active THEN 'active'
     WHEN player_participation_weeks.pid IS NULL
          AND player_years_teams.teams IS NOT NULL
          AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM team_weeks_played
            WHERE team_weeks_played.year = player_years_weeks.year
              AND team_weeks_played.week = player_years_weeks.week
              AND team_weeks_played.team = ANY(player_years_teams.teams)
          )
       THEN 'bye'
     ELSE NULL
   END, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by player_years_weeks.week DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
